description_long: This is a large, two-story brick house with a complex roofline featuring both gable and hip elements, as well as a small turret. The facade is adorned with multiple white-framed windows arranged in symmetrical rows, and the main entrance is accentuated by a covered porch supported by columns. The house includes a spacious rear terrace with a fenced-in swimming pool and outdoor seating area, suggesting a focus on leisure and outdoor living. Mature trees and landscaping elements are present on both sides, enhancing the residential and suburban character. The exterior walls are primarily brick, with white trim and railings providing contrast. The overall design blends traditional and modern elements, giving the house a stately yet inviting appearance.
description: A large, two-story brick house with a complex roofline, white-trimmed windows, a covered porch, and a rear terrace with a swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch, symmetrical windows, and landscaping on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the turret, side windows, and the start of the rear terrace and pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive terrace, fenced swimming pool, and back facade with multiple windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the turret, side landscaping, and the full extension of the terrace and pool.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with bay and turret windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with columns, steps, and decorative trim
